name: botdojo-chat-sdk-playground
description: Interactive playground for BotDojo Chat SDK - explore chat widgets, MCP Apps, and headless integrations with live examples and debugging

scripts.dev: concurrently -n next,bundle -c cyan,yellow "next dev -p 3500" "npm run bundle:mcp-app:watch"
scripts.bundle:mcp-app: node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js pages/examples/chat-sdk/mcp-app-example/canvas/remote-url-app.tsx && node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js pages/examples/chat-sdk/document-edit/canvas/review.tsx && node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js pages/examples/chat-sdk/document-edit/canvas/review-mcp-app.tsx && node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js pages/examples/chat-sdk/bonsai-shop/canvas/product-card.tsx && node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js pages/examples/chat-sdk/bonsai-shop/canvas/cart.tsx && node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js pages/examples/chat-sdk/bonsai-shop/canvas/checkout-summary.tsx
scripts.bundle:mcp-app:watch: concurrently "node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js --watch pages/examples/chat-sdk/mcp-app-example/canvas/remote-url-app.tsx" "node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js --watch pages/examples/chat-sdk/document-edit/canvas/review.tsx" "node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js --watch pages/examples/chat-sdk/document-edit/canvas/review-mcp-app.tsx" "node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js --watch pages/examples/chat-sdk/bonsai-shop/canvas/product-card.tsx" "node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js --watch pages/examples/chat-sdk/bonsai-shop/canvas/cart.tsx" "node scripts/bundle-mcp-app.js --watch pages/examples/chat-sdk/bonsai-shop/canvas/checkout-summary.tsx"
